g.title: ndjson | csv | wkb -> flat GeoParquet, hive-partitioned by year/month/day
preprocess --spatial-index/--no-spatial-index
Reproject to EPSG:3857, then either calculate_spatial_partitions() or skip it entirely
Drop speed-implausible position outliers per vessel (v_max, d_min gate)
trajectory compute --partition-method vessel|spatiotemporal
Voyage segmentation & feature engineering
{tag}_trajectorized.geoparquet -- trip_id, speed_mps, VesselGroup, ...; a usable output on its own, not just an intermediate
Point-pair line segments for rendering
Full voyage LineString/MultiLineString per trip
{tag}_segments.geoparquet -- point-pair lines; also a usable output on its own, before the render-specific preprocessing
{tag}_lines.geoparquet
config: category_column set (e.g. VesselGroup) or empty
Canvas.line() per tile; border-expand+crop; direction canonicalization
Builds coarser zoom levels, applies colormap + robust-max normalization, per band
export_single_cog: reads base-zoom Zarr tiles directly, no colormap/normalization -- raw band values -> GeoTIFF

g.text: vessel (shuffle on mmsi, no spatial index)
